title: Blackspur BB-TM255 Contractors Dual Blade Tape Measure
description: Product Description Blackspur tape measure dual markings and belt clip has dual blade breaks which allow you to quickly hold the blade in position. The blades are protected by a hardened acrylic coating which will prevent rusting and corrosion. Measures 3m length by 16mm width. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Tape
